document.title: Agent Orientation
document.purpose: Startup guidance for code agents working in this repository.

find-the-registry.instruction: Look for a registry.json file and treat it as an index into essential references.
rules: If the registry references Lion's definitions file, read it.
If writing code, read Lion's programming philosophy documents first.
Do not read every resource preemptively; load only what is needed for the current task.

project-structure.cli-support: Use lionscliapp for command routing and persisted app settings.
notes: Documents should use serial numbering where appropriate.
